title: Odyssey, Book 11: The Land of the Dead
description: Book 11 of Homer's Odyssey: The Land of the Dead.
introduction: Book 11 of the Odyssey: The Land of the Dead. The Greek text follows the standard Homeric vulgate.

translation.original_text: Αὐτὰρ ἐπεί ῥ᾿ ἐπὶ νῆα κατήλθομεν ἠδὲ θάλασσαν.
translation.text: Odysseus sailed to the edge of the world and summoned the dead. Tiresias prophesied his return and warned of the cattle of the Sun. His mother's shade told him Penelope still waited. He spoke with Agamemnon, who was murdered by his wife; with Achilles, who said he would rather be a living serf than king of all the dead; with Ajax, who turned away in silence, still angry over the armor.
